docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUMMELT, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEDELL, THERESA $1,634.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,649.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SEDELL, THERESA HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY THERESA SEDELL IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-15-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUMMELT, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEDELL, THERESA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,543.17 FILED BY GUMMELT, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SEDELL, THERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUMMELT, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SEDELL, THERESA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-31-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEDELL, THERESA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUMMELT, MICHAEL
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUMMELT, MICHAEL
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL GUMMELT (BY ZOOM) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THERESA SEDELL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.
